dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, look at what they did. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_was} hit last night. I know exactly who is responsible: {quest_threat_the}, born out of {quest_origin}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The ones behind this hired {enemy_type_plural} as muscle. They are still camped {location_hint}, guarding the spoils. I need you to go there and put every last one of them down before they can disappear with what they stole.
dialogueChunks.outro: They destroyed {quest_stakes_the} out of spite. I will see justice done, one way or another.

dialogueChunks.intro: Someone targeted us deliberately, {player_name}. {quest_threat_animate_The} sabotaged {quest_focus_the} and now {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} paying the price.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I will not let this stand. The criminals left a trail of {enemy_type_plural} enforcers behind them {location_hint} to cover their escape. Someone needs to cut through those creatures before {quest_time_pressure} and the trail goes cold.
dialogueChunks.outro: This was no accident. This was a crime, and I want the one responsible to answer for it.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat_animate_the} broke into {quest_focus_the} and took everything of value. This was not random: it was born out of {quest_origin} and aimed straight at {quest_stakes_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I need you to {quest_action}. The trail leads {location_hint}. {quest_ally} says the thieves are still nearby. Track them down and put an end to this: the {enemy_type_plural} they hired will not let you pass quietly.
dialogueChunks.outro: Bring back what was taken and there will be {quest_reward_hint} for your trouble. But more importantly, bring back our dignity.

dialogueChunks.intro: I am not a violent person, {player_name}. But what they did to {quest_focus_the} demands a violent answer.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Since {quest_origin}, {quest_threat_animate_the} {quest_threat_animate_has} been plotting this. They struck when we were weakest and used {enemy_type_plural} to do the dirty work. {quest_ally} tracked the creatures back to a camp {location_hint} where they are hoarding everything they took.
dialogueChunks.outro: Kill the {enemy_type_plural} guarding that camp. Every one of them is complicit in what was done to {quest_stakes_the}.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, they thought no one would fight back. They thought we would just accept what happened to {quest_focus_the} and move on. They were wrong.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} found where the criminals retreated to: a fortified position {location_hint} with {enemy_type_plural} patrolling the perimeter. They are brazen about it: they think their hired muscle makes them untouchable. {quest_stakes_The} will remain in jeopardy until those creatures are dealt with.
dialogueChunks.outro: Show them what happens when someone fights back. Kill the {enemy_type_plural} and tear down their protection.

dialogueChunks.intro: When I found out what {quest_threat_animate_the} did, {player_name}, my first thought was grief. My second was anger. The anger won.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The crime was planned and executed with precision. They knew exactly where {quest_focus_the} was vulnerable and they hit it hard. Now their {enemy_type_plural} are entrenched {location_hint}, keeping anyone from recovering what was stolen. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} in their hands.
dialogueChunks.outro: I am asking you to right a wrong. Kill those creatures and clear the way to recovering {quest_stakes_the}.
